title: Shann's Mon [Cobblemon]
body:
# **Introduction**

- Shann's data package and resource package contain Cobblemon models that have not been added to the current version

## **Content**

- Groudon
- GroudonPrimal
- GreatTusk
- IronBundle
- Chien-Pao

## Spawn

- Groudon:--badlands,savanna---ultra rare
- GroudonPrimal:--badlands,savanna---ultra rare
- GreatTusk:--badlands,savanna,plains,sunflower_plains---ultra rare
- IronBundle:--snowy_plains,snowy_slopes,ice_spikes---ultra rare
- Chien-Pao:--snowy_plains,snowy_slopes,ice_spikes---ultra rare
